song.title: From The Morning To The Evening
song.lyrics: [V1] . D A 1) From the morning to the evening, . Bm G His faithfulness I see. . D A His mercy reaching sinners, . F#m Bm Reaching even me, . Em A And I know, now I know… . D A Brighter than the brightest sunlight, . Bm G All doubts and fears just cease; . D A Sweeter than the sweetest delight, . F#m Bm His living Word in me . Em A And I know, now I know… [C] Chorus . D F#m G A That God is there for me tomorrow, as He is for me today, . D F#m G A That He’ll take my cares and sorrows and He’ll wipe them all away, . D F#m G A There’s no crisis that He can’t bear, there’s no storm He can’t abate; . G A D He’s my God, He’s my God. [V2] 2) Day by day His grace grows dearer; His love has conquered me, Never leaving, never ceasing, His Spirit constantly Flooding me, rich and free; Higher than the highest heaven, He lifts me up to see New Jerusalem descending, His Bride, His love to be; Eternally, it shall be.
